# Ralph Progress Log
PRD: prd-2026-04-15-095323-minimax-agent-chunk-growth-id-d9d7e2~running.json
Started: Wed Apr 15 17:24:35 UTC 2026
---

## Codebase Patterns
- The minimax-agent plugin accesses the host app's Axios instance through webpack internals (webpackChunk_N_E)
- Plugin lifecycle hooks (onDeactivate) are available via `override onDeactivate()` on the OpenTabsPlugin subclass
- Plugins in this repo need `npm install` before building if node_modules is missing (they're standalone, not in the workspace)
- The `opentabs-plugin build` step resolves SDK version from node_modules ‚Äî ensure `npm install` has run first
- Webpack's `__webpack_require__.c` exposes the module cache ‚Äî use this for runtime module discovery instead of hardcoding numeric IDs

## 2026-04-15 - US-001
- **What was implemented**: Cached the webpack require function in a module-level variable (`cachedRequire`) so `chunk.push()` is called at most once per adapter lifetime instead of on every API call
- **Files changed**:
  - `plugins/minimax-agent/src/minimax-api.ts` ‚Äî Added `cachedRequire` variable, early return in `getWebpackRequire()`, cache assignment on success, exported `resetWebpackCache()` function
  - `plugins/minimax-agent/src/index.ts` ‚Äî Imported `resetWebpackCache`, added `onDeactivate()` hook to clear the cache on teardown
- **Learnings for future iterations:**
  - The `getAuthCache`/`setAuthCache` mechanism (CACHE_NS) tracks whether Axios was successfully obtained ‚Äî it's separate from the webpack require cache and must not be removed
  - The probeId uses `Date.now()` to avoid webpack cache collisions ‚Äî this is intentional and must remain unique per probe
  - Plugin node_modules may be missing in worktrees ‚Äî run `npm install` in the plugin directory if the build fails with SDK resolution errors
---

## 2026-04-15 - US-002
- **What was implemented**: Replaced hardcoded webpack module ID 33993 with dynamic module discovery by scanning `req.c` (webpack module cache) for exports matching the Axios interface (HTTP methods + interceptors)
- **Files changed**:
  - `plugins/minimax-agent/src/minimax-api.ts` ‚Äî Added `cachedAxios` variable, `isAxiosLike` type guard, rewrote `getAxios()` to scan module cache, updated `resetWebpackCache()` to clear Axios cache
- **Learnings for future iterations:**
  - Webpack's `__webpack_require__` function exposes `.c` as the module cache (object mapping IDs to `{ exports }` objects) ‚Äî iterate this instead of calling `req(id)` for unknown IDs to avoid executing unloaded modules
  - Axios instances are uniquely identifiable by having both HTTP method functions (`.get`, `.post`) AND an `.interceptors` property ‚Äî this distinguishes them from generic objects with `.get`/`.post` methods
  - Biome's `noUselessContinue` rule flags `continue` in catch blocks at the end of a for loop ‚Äî use an empty catch or a comment instead
  - Biome's formatter prefers single-line type assertions when they fit ‚Äî avoid manually wrapping `as` type expressions across multiple lines
---
